name: Crescent Roll
short_description: The all-in-one, super-sweet, physics-based, gravity-altering, action-packed, bite-sized 2D marble racing game.
detailed_description:
Double, double, tilt and tumble; Bread may burn, but cookies crumble.

The all-in-one, super-sweet, physics-based, gravity-altering, action-packed, bite-sized 2D marble racing game. Now available to-go on Steam Deck!

Easy to Learn, Hard to Master

Controls are simple: Tilt the stage left and right to navigate the treat to the end. Each and every course can be finished in 30 seconds or less, but don't be fooled - you'll need cookie-cutter precision to beat the hardest clear times and earn all all 3 Hearts.

From cannons to conveyor belts, to bouncy jelly, slippery ice, zero-g static, and surprisingly nice looking water; among the dozens of recipes you'll find all kinds of unique twists to keep you on your toes. Use them to your advantage to shave seconds off your time.

Turn up the Heat in Challenge Mode

Once you've got the basics down, it's time to get down to business. In Challenge Mode, the clock is ticking, and you have a never-ending stream of randomized special orders to fill with all kinds of strange effects. From shrinking your ball down to encasing it in jelly, each changes how you need to approach every stage. The longer you go, the more Dough you earn and the more coins get added to the stage, but the less time is restored and the more effects get piled on at once.

How long can you hang on?

Take a Break with Cookie Jar Mode

Need some down time? Once you clear 10 recipes, then you'll have enough sweets to play Cookie Jar mode. In these stages, instead of navigating to the end, you'll need to continuously match two treats of the same type to merge them together into the next size up. Bigger treats are worth more points, so you'll need to plan ahead to use the unique shapes and features of each stage to cram in as many confections as you can, as once the jar overflows, it's Game Over.

How big can you go?

Earn some Sweet Treats

As you play the different modes, you'll net some Dough for your troubles. Spend it on some sweet gear to give a little bit more custom flavor as you perfect your craft. There's dozens of weird and wacky hats and hairstyles to collect, so there's sure to be at least one that you don't totally hate. Maybe.

Easy-Bake Mods

Why not try out somebody else's cooking? Or better yet - bake it yourself! The built-in mod loader and interactive cookbook give you the ingredients to add in stages, hats, and more! Everything is done through simple text-based configuration files. No coding required!

And more!

Fresh new stuff is constantly being added to the menu, so check back often!

The game tastes best when served with a controller or device that has gyroscopic capabilities, but it is perfectly playable with touch or a standard mouse and keyboard.
